## Meeting Purpose

[Provide an in-depth overview of HockeyStack's platform capabilities and use cases for growthx.ai's content creation workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HockeyStack offers two main products: Marketing Intelligence (attribution, reporting, AI analyst) and Account Intelligence (sales enablement, scoring)](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Core value prop: Unified data ingestion across marketing/sales touchpoints to map full buyer journey and extract actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Key differentiators: Anonymous user tracking, granular data analysis, AI-powered insights (Odin for marketing, Nova for sales)](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Primary ICP is marketing teams seeking attribution and data-driven decision support](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Platform Overview & Data Ingestion

  - [Connects to CRM, marketing automation, paid channels, website (pixel)](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Tracks anonymous + known user activity across entire buyer journey](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Uses fingerprinting (not cookies) for anonymous user tracking](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Creates AI-powered account context as foundation for both products](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Marketing Intelligence Product

  - [Attribution modeling (multi-touch, predictive)](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Custom reporting with flexible data slicing](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Odin AI analyst for natural language queries](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Incrementality/lift reporting to measure true campaign impact](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Account Intelligence Product

  - [Sales-focused view with account scoring, signals, and engagement data](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [AI-generated account plans and personalized outreach suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Workflow automation for scaling signal-based actions](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Stakeholder mapping and enrichment capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### Implementation & Adoption

  - [3-4 days for initial attribution dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Fully operational within 5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Dedicated CSM support for setup and custom dashboard creation](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Products can be purchased separately or bundled](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jackson to send custom deal room with additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Erik to review materials and follow up with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Potential for further discussions on specific use cases or technical details](https://fathom.video/share/5Wzr37T2z1pbAykUuiHk1sHoa-Fbdeqk?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
